---
title: A Chemical Plant MPC
author: Walter Dal'Maz Silva
date: today
execute:
  cache: true
  echo: false
format:
  html:
    theme: default
  typst:
    margin: {x: 2.5cm, top: 3.0cm, bottom: 2.0cm}
    logo:
      path: _assets/logo.svg
      width: 5cm
      location: right top
      padding: 10mm
    fig-format: png
    fig-dpi: 300
jupyter:
  jupytext:
    text_representation:
      extension: .qmd
      format_name: quarto
      format_version: '1.0'
      jupytext_version: 1.19.4
  kernelspec:
    display_name: Python 3 (ipykernel)
    language: python
    name: python3
---

```{=typst}
#show table: align.with(center)
```
